public_reputation: Known around Cosmoria through day-to-day work as archivist.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Cosmoria, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of archivist in and around Cosmoria, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cosmoria workable through the obligations of archivist while managing the immediate pressure of storm weather, trade vulnerability.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of archivist credible while absorbing the strain created by storm weather, trade vulnerability.

adventure_hooks.summary: Coralyn Tideglass can draw the party into a locality problem centered on archivist duties in Cosmoria.
Coralyn Tideglass becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with storm weather, trade vulnerability around Cosmoria.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Coralyn Tideglass is immediately readable as a archivist tied to Cosmoria.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cosmoria: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Coralyn Tideglass presents as someone shaped by the duties of a archivist and the daily pressures of Cosmoria.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a archivist, and proof that strangers will not make Cosmoria harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Coralyn Tideglass refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a archivist too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can retrieve records, resolve name confusion, and expose document tampering.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Coralyn Tideglass adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Coralyn Tideglass always knows more about Cosmoria than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a archivist in Cosmoria.
